# RCIT Wiki

Welcome to the Rational Chromogeometric Information Theory (RCIT) Wiki. This knowledge base serves as a central repository for the mathematical foundations, programming standards, and physical research associated with the project.

## Navigation

- **[Mathematics](./Maths/Wildberger/Wildberger_Library.md)**
  Comprehensive library of constructive mathematics, including the Math Foundations series, the Algebra of Boole, and Box Arithmetic.
  - *See also: [Herner Collection](./Maths/Herner/Index.md) for Algebraic Logic research.*

- **[Programming](./Programming/Index.md)**
  Technical documentation for the Idris 2 implementation of RCIT. Includes linear types references, testing guidelines, and multiset implementation instructions.

- **[Physics](./Physics/Index.md)**
  Research into the physical implications of RCIT, including the 2D/3D bridge and information paradox resolutions.

---
*For high-level project summaries and foundational findings, please refer to the [Knowledge Base](../Knowledge_Base/Index.md).*
